579 OXGN_HIGH_CNCNTRTN_ADMSN_CD OXGN_HIGH_CNCNTRTN_ADMSN_CD Therapies: Oxygen - High-concentration (Admission) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was receiving high-concentration oxygen therapy. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
